note: Shared word-timings fixture for the apples-to-apples HF-vs-Remotion over-speaker spike. Consumed UNCHANGED by both engines (HF overspeaker-spike.html and Remotion SpeakerOverlayScene16x9) so only the render engine differs. 8 words, 30fps, ~3.8s of speech + tail. Frames are absolute (startFrame/endFrame) for Remotion's FloatingCaption; seconds for Hyperframes' GSAP seek. Logo pop is keyed to the word 'futuro' (startSeconds 2.475 → enterFrame 74) in both engines.
